title: Game Hub Holiday Pack 2024
description: Curated for the Game Hub's 2024 holiday season modded Minecraft SMP.
body:
The Holiday Pack is curated for the Game Hub's 2024 holiday season modded Minecraft SMP. The aim is to provide a low-power, optimized, Vanilla+ base from which to explore bigger mods like Cobblemon and Create. Below are some of the most notable inclusions:

## Core
- [CC: Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/mod/gu7yAYhd) - Adds programmable computers, turtles and more.
- [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/MdwFAVRL) - Adds Pokémon to the world, letting you find, battle, capture, and evolve them.
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/Xbc0uyRg) - Technology that empowers the player.
- [Hephaestus](https://modrinth.com/mod/sdSn3wvy) - A little of this, a little of that, a lot of tinkering, and a lot of tools.
- [re:squake](https://modrinth.com/mod/a9PBgIsO) - Brings quake-style movement into the game.

## Supplements
- [Amendments](https://modrinth.com/mod/6iTJugQR) - Many tweaks to Vanilla blocks.
- [Backpacked](https://www.curseforge.com/projects/352835) - A simple backpack mod with a focus on customisation.
- [Comforts](https://modrinth.com/mod/SaCpeal4) - Adds sleeping bags and hammocks.
- [Crate Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/9rlXSyLg) - Adds crates and bags.
- [Create: Deco](https://modrinth.com/mod/sMvUb4Rb) - Decorative options for your Create factory.
- [Create: Estrogen](https://modrinth.com/mod/HhIJW8n1) - An addon based around expressing yourself, fluid handling, and expanding your factory.
- [Create: Slice & Dice](https://modrinth.com/mod/GmjmRQ0A) - Makes automation for Farmer's Delight more sensible.
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/7vxePowz) - A cozy expansion to farming and cooking.
- [Joy of Painting](https://modrinth.com/mod/YOs4tZea) - Let your creativity roam free or paint memes.
- [Music Maker Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/qQpWCN75) - Adds music sheets, instruments and other devices to the game.
- [Spelunkery](https://modrinth.com/mod/krskFMfA) - An overhaul to everything underground.
- [Storage Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/LTTvOp5L) - Adds more storage options.
- [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/fFEIiSDQ) - Many functional and useful Vanilla+ blocks.

## World
- [ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village](https://modrinth.com/mod/fgmhI8kH) - Enhances and creates new villages and pillager outposts.
- [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/mod/lWDHr9jE) - Massively altered world generation with mountain ranges, underground rivers and more.
- [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/8oi3bsk5) - Almost 100 new biomes consisting of both realism and light fantasy, using just Vanilla blocks.
- [YUNG's Better suite](https://www.curseforge.com/members/yungnickyoung/projects) - Complete redesigns of most Vanilla structures.

The Holiday pack also comes preconfigured with [Complementary Reimagined](https://www.complementary.dev/shaders/) shaders and [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/uCdwusMi). Combined with an extensive suite of performance mods, these make the Holiday Pack look amazing without sacrificing precious frames.
